description: Field technician available for IoT fault dispatch. Links to a Dataverse system user for contact details (name, email, phone). Availability and GPS position are updated by the dispatch agent.

columns.description: Full display name of the technician (e.g. 'Jane Smith'). Synced from the linked system user.
Link to the Dataverse system user record. Provides name, email, and phone via the user profile.
Current availability status. Available = eligible for dispatch. On Job = has open assignment. Off Shift = not eligible.
Experience level of the technician. Used when selecting the best available tech for complex faults.
Current GPS latitude of the technician. Updated as techs move between assignments.
Current GPS longitude of the technician. Updated as techs move between assignments.
Human-readable location description (e.g. 'Building A, Floor 2' or 'Boston – Back Bay').
